name: accounting firms processing 10-20 client accounts/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10-20 client accounts/month, manual reconciliation causes delayed financial statements. We automate account reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of client accounts leads to delayed financial statements
